data.queryValue:
WITH
-- 0) Параметры (GEO и UTM мультиселект + окно склейки)
list_p AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$,'E''|''|\(|\)|\s','', 'g') = '' THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$,'E''|''|\(|\)|\s','', 'g'), ',')::text[]
    END AS geo_arr,
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{utm_list}} $$,'E''|''|\(|\)|\s','', 'g') = '' THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(regexp_replace($$ {{utm_list}} $$,'E''|''|\(|\)|\s','', 'g'), ',')::text[]
    END AS utm_arr
),
param_p AS (
  -- окно (в днях), внутри которого считаем «одну сессию» (НЕ повтор)
  SELECT COALESCE({{date_book_interval}}, 0)::int AS book_window_days
),

-- 1) Первая СДЕЛКА клиента (по всей истории) → utmsource
first_deal_rows AS (
  SELECT
    cp.person_key,
    l.crm_id,
    l.creation_date_time::timestamp AS first_deal_dt,
    NULLIF(trim(l.utmsource), '')   AS utmsource
  FROM mart.parent_child_leads l
  JOIN v_person_key cp
    ON cp.account_id      = l.account_id
   AND cp.contacts_amo_id = l.contacts_amo_id
  WHERE l.creation_date_time IS NOT NULL
),
first_deal_global AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (f.person_key)
         f.person_key,
         COALESCE(f.utmsource, 'unknown') AS first_deal_utmsource,
         f.first_deal_dt,
         f.crm_id AS first_deal_crm_id
  FROM first_deal_rows f
  ORDER BY f.person_key, f.first_deal_dt, f.crm_id
),

-- 2) Покупки отчётного набора (с учётом GEO/интервала и фильтра по источнику ПЕРВОЙ сделки)
report_pp AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.crm_id,
    v.booking_date::date       AS booking_date,
    v.prev_booking_date::date  AS prev_booking_date,
    v.geo
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  LEFT JOIN first_deal_global fdg USING (person_key)
  CROSS JOIN list_p lp
  WHERE v.geo IN ('ОАЭ','Москва','Грузия','Таиланд','Бали','Таиланд Eng')
    AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR v.geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))
    AND (lp.utm_arr IS NULL OR fdg.first_deal_utmsource = ANY(lp.utm_arr))
    AND v.booking_date >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND v.booking_date <  {{interval_to}}::date
),

-- 3) Повторы с учётом окна: сравнение ЦЕЛЫХ дней с int-параметром
repeats AS (
  SELECT
    person_key,
    crm_id,
    booking_date,
    prev_booking_date,
    (booking_date - prev_booking_date)   AS days_gap,  -- integer (дни)
    age(booking_date, prev_booking_date) AS diff       -- interval (years mons days)
  FROM report_pp
  WHERE prev_booking_date IS NOT NULL
    AND (booking_date - prev_booking_date) > (SELECT book_window_days FROM param_p)
),

-- 4) Перевод разницы в «полные месяцы + остаток дней» и округление вверх при остатке
repeats_months AS (
  SELECT
    person_key,
    crm_id,
    booking_date,
    prev_booking_date,
    (date_part('year',  diff)::int * 12 + date_part('month', diff)::int) AS months_full,
    date_part('day', diff)::int                                          AS days_rest
  FROM repeats
),
bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    (months_full + CASE WHEN days_rest > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS months_since_prev
  FROM repeats_months
)

-- 5) Итог: распределение повторных броней по числу месяцев с прошлой покупки
SELECT
  months_since_prev                     AS "Месяцев с прошлой покупки",
  COUNT(*)                              AS "Брони"
  -- , ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 0), 2) AS "Доля, %"
FROM bucketed
GROUP BY months_since_prev
ORDER BY months_since_prev
